title: Nostalgic Sepia Photographer Influencer
promptText: DSLR photo: A warm sepia-toned overlay captures the nostalgic and timeless essence of the scene. The subject is a person with chestnut hair, holding a Canon EOS 200D DSLR camera, poised to take a photograph. The background is a soft-focus vintage studio setting. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures.
